_note: Token values confirmed from Figma MCP extraction (nodes 5050:816 and 7538:204). Eleven types: six semantic (error, info, Success, Warning, default, outlined) and five utility (purple, violet, cyan, teal, pink). Dark mode values confirmed for semantic types. Utility type dark mode values are TODO.

background.description: Background fill for the error type.

text.description: Text and icon color for the error type.

background.description: Background fill for the info type.

text.description: Text and icon color for the info type.

background.description: Background fill for the Success type.

text.description: Text and icon color for the Success type.

background.description: Background fill for the Warning type. Note: token name uses a double dash (warning--bg) — this is the confirmed Figma token name.

text.description: Text and icon color for the Warning type.

background.description: Background fill for the default (neutral) type.

text.description: Text and icon color for the default type. Also used for the outlined type.

background.description: No background fill for the outlined type.

border.description: 1px solid border for the outlined type.

text.description: Text and icon color for the outlined type. Shares the default text token.

background.description: Background fill for the purple utility type.

text.description: Text and icon color for the purple utility type.

background.description: Background fill for the violet utility type.

text.description: Text and icon color for the violet utility type.

background.description: Background fill for the cyan utility type.

text.description: Text and icon color for the cyan utility type.

background.description: Background fill for the teal utility type.

text.description: Text and icon color for the teal utility type.

background.description: Background fill for the pink utility type.

text.description: Text and icon color for the pink utility type.

borderRadius.description: Full pill shape. Applied to all types.

paddingHorizontal.description: Left and right padding. Exception: error and purple types use asymmetric padding — left: 8px, right: 12px (--spacing-12).

default.name: Customer-Icon/alert-war-triangle
default.description: Default icon used by all types when iconType is null. Color matches the text token for the given type.

whitespace.description: Label does not wrap. Keep text short.
